query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS task_schedule_history (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  taskId VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  cardTrelloId VARCHAR(64),
  previousStartTime TIMESTAMP NULL,
  previousEndTime TIMESTAMP NULL,
  newStartTime TIMESTAMP NULL,
  newEndTime TIMESTAMP NULL,
  changedBy VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  reason VARCHAR(255),
  source ENUM('manual', 'auto', 'batch', 'conflict_resolution') DEFAULT 'manual' NOT NULL,
  hadConflicts INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  conflictDetails TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_taskId (taskId),
  INDEX idx_changedBy (changedBy)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS batch_operations (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  operationType ENUM('re_analyze', 'reschedule', 'conflict_resolution', 'optimization') NOT NULL,
  description VARCHAR(255),
  totalTasks INT NOT NULL,
  completedTasks INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  failedTasks INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('pending', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  progress DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  currentTaskIndex INT DEFAULT 0,
  currentTaskName VARCHAR(255),
  estimatedTimeSeconds INT,
  elapsedTimeSeconds INT DEFAULT 0,
  results TEXT,
  errorLog TEXT,
  parameters TEXT,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS keyboard_shortcuts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  shortcutKey VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description VARCHAR(255),
  isCustom INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  isEnabled INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_shortcut (userId, shortcutKey),
  INDEX idx_userId (userId)
);

  hadConflicts INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  conflictDetails TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS batch_operations (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  operationType ENUM('re_analyze', 'reschedule', 'conflict_resolution', 'optimization') NOT NULL,
  description VARCHAR(255),
  totalTasks INT NOT NULL,
  completedTasks INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  failedTasks INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('pending', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  progress DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  currentTaskIndex INT DEFAULT 0,
  currentTaskName VARCHAR(255),
  estimatedTimeSeconds INT,
  elapsedTimeSeconds INT DEFAULT 0,
  results TEXT,
  errorLog TEXT,
  parameters TEXT,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS keyboard_shortcuts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  shortcutKey VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description VARCHAR(255),
  isCustom INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  isEnabled INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_shortcut (userId, shortcutKey),
  INDEX idx_userId (userId)
);
